title: Russian language support for Colourful Containers
description: Russian language support for Colourful Containers
body:
What's this resourcepack?
You don't like the lack of names for storage blocks in [Colourful containers GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui) and you use russian language in Minecraft? If this is you, you will like this resource pack because it translates the old version of the names of storage blocks(now "show text" setting in [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)) and [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) settings to russian.
